• KAPE - Kroll Artifact Parser and Extractor (KAPE) by Eric Zimmerman. A triage tool that finds the most prevalent digital artifacts and then parses them quickly. Great and thorough when time is of the essence.
• LOKIstars2.6k - Free IR scanner for scanning endpoint with yara rules and other indicators(IOCs).
• micropython-extmod-generatorstars19 - Generator for MicroPython external modules written in C.
• micropython-uloggerstars14 - Lightweight log module customized for MicroPython.
• ucryptostars7 - MicroPython package for doing fast elliptic curve cryptography, specifically digital signatures. API design inspired from fastecdsa and implementation based on tomsfastmath.
• embitstars34 - A minimal bitcoin library for MicroPython and Python3 with a focus on embedded systems.
• eiscp-micropythonstars2 - MicroPython port for the Onkyo-EISCP protocol used, among others, by Pioneer.
• micropython-ad840xstars1 - MicroPython SPI-based manipulation of the AD series digital potentiometers AD8400, AD8402 and AD8403.
• upyblestars7 - Command line tool for Bluetooth Low Energy MicroPython devices.
• MicroPythonBLEHIDstars84 - Human Interface Device (HID) over Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) GATT library for MicroPython.
• Atomic Red Team (ART)stars6.6k - Small and highly portable detection tests mapped to the MITRE ATT&CK Framework.
• Introduction to DFIR - By Scott J. Roberts.
• Digital Forensics Discord Server - Community of 8,000+ working professionals from Law Enforcement, Private Sector, and Forensic Vendors. Additionally, plenty of students and hobbyists! Guide here.
• SANS DFIR mailing list - Mailing list by SANS for DFIR.
• PALADIN - Modified Linux distribution to perform various forensics task in a forensically sound manner. It comes with many open source forensics tools included.
• FastIR Collector Linuxstars152 - FastIR for Linux collects different artifacts on live Linux and records the results in CSV files.

• Log Parser Lizard - Execute SQL queries against structured log data: server logs, Windows Events, file system, Active Directory, log4net logs, comma/tab separated text, XML or JSON files. Also provides a GUI to Microsoft LogParser 2.2 with powerful UI elements: syntax editor, data grid, chart, pivot table, dashboard, query manager and more.
• OSForensics - Tool to acquire live memory on 32-bit and 64-bit systems. A dump of an individual process’s memory space or physical memory dump can be done.
• Kansastars1.3k - Modular incident response framework in PowerShell.
• Muninstars702 - Online hash checker for VirusTotal and other services.
• PyaraScannerstars21 - Very simple multi-threaded many-rules to many-files YARA scanning Python script for malware zoos and IR.
• Metadefender Cloud - Free threat intelligence platform providing multiscanning, data sanitization and vulnerability assessment of files.

• DFIR ORC - DFIR ORC is a collection of specialized tools dedicated to reliably parse and collect critical artifacts such as the MFT, registry hives or event logs. DFIR ORC collects data, but does not analyze it: it is not meant to triage machines. It provides a forensically relevant snapshot of machines running Microsoft Windows. The code can be found on GitHubstars294.

• FastIR Collectorstars478 - Tool that collects different artifacts on live Windows systems and records the results in csv files. With the analyses of these artifacts, an early compromise can be detected.
• MEERKATstars355 - PowerShell-based triage and threat hunting for Windows.
• The ZSH Reference Card and zsh-lovers site are indispensable.
• kvrohit/substrata.nvimstars82 - A cold, dark color scheme for Neovim written in Lua ported from arzg/vim-substratastars177 theme.
• Thundra Foresight - A visibility tool into your test suites by spotting test failures in no time.
• micropython-multiaxis - Multiaxis with MicroPython ESP32 and DRV8825.

• BIPES - Web based IDE for MicroPython with file manager, editor, code generation from blocks, IoT dashboard and Serial/USB/Bluetooth/WebREPL console on the web browser! Source: https://github.com/BIPES.
• jameshiew/nvim-magicstars167 - Framework for integrating AI code assistance.
• https://rsshub.uneasy.win/ by 胜之不易 70
• quetiestars110 - Just the cutest and tiniest queue/deque implementation!

• Roppers Computing Fundamentals
    • Free, self-paced curriculum that builds a base of knowledge in computers and networking. Intended to build up a student with no prior technical knowledge to be confident in their ability to learn anything and continue their security education. Full text available as a gitbook.

• Roppers CTF Fundamentals Course - Free course designed to get a student crushing CTFs as quickly as possible. Teaches the mentality and skills required for crypto, forensics, and more. Full text available as a gitbook.

• Roppers Security Fundamentals - Free course that teaches a beginner how security works in the real world. Learn security theory and execute defensive measures so that you are better prepared against threats online and in the physical world. Full text available as a gitbook.
